title: Oars and Moria’s Nightmare
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Luffy, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Franky, Unknown person #3 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.
scene: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Luffy, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Franky, focusing on the immediate stakes of oars and moria’s nightmare.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: While doing this, all of your nakamas...

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: usopp!! So that's where you were!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Why is he shouting at the monster!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Moron Cook bastard... Did you save Nami?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Scary........!!! Scary........!!! We can't fight against that!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: No way, is it gonna stretch !!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Where have I heard that name before...?

summary: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Luffy, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Franky, focusing on the immediate stakes of oars and moria’s nightmare.
